title: Vanessa Bryant Reveals Upcoming Nike Kobe Protro Colorways
summary:
Summary

Vanessa Bryant took to social media to showcase an expansive look at several unreleased Nike Kobe Protro sneakersThe multi-model reveal features fresh storytelling concepts across the signature Kobe 5, Kobe 6, and Kobe 9 silhouettesWhile some pairs may remain exclusive to the Bryant family and select athletes, the lineup signals an expansive future for the performance line

The Nike Kobe Protro collection is entering an expressive new era following a surprise social media reveal. Vanessa Bryant took to her Instagram stories to preview a massive lineup of unreleased colorways across the late Black Mamba’s signature line, showcasing unique storytelling themes spanning multiple silhouette generations.The private showcase introduces imaginative concepts to the performance basketball line. Leading the preview is a Philadelphia Eagles-themed execution of the Kobe 5 Protro, which applies rich green suede and a textured black chenille side Swoosh to honor Kobe's hometown football fandom. The scaly upper of the Kobe 6 Protro receives a playful Disney-inspired "Polka Dot" pack in alternating red and white combinations, alongside a floral-adorned "Bellissima" colorway that nods to Bryant's childhood in Italy.The preview also highlights the return of the ninth signature model. A clean "Dusty Pink" edition of the low-top Kobe 9 EM features an understated mesh construction atop a classic gum rubber outsole. Finally, the ultra-high collar of the Kobe 9 Elite High Protro serves as the canvas for an "Iron Man" homage, combining a hot rod red Flyknit base with metallic gold structural overlays and electric blue branding to mimic Tony Stark's iconic armor plates.

Click here to view full gallery at Hypebeast

While some pairs may remain exclusive to the Bryant family and select athletes, the lineup signals an expansive future for the performance line
